title: Hypixel FancyRank
description: Makes Hypixel's rank tags look cleaner and more visually appealing.
body:
Makes Hypixel's ranks look better.
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e7e63edc2a18b31e2db3082ae0e4d894165f835.png)

Better team tags and bug fixes coming soon.

> Note: The assets used are not mine, they were originally used in [Hysentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/hysentials). These assets are licensed under the LGPL-3.0-only licence, meaning they are free to use under the conditions of the license. If you wish to use these assets, please do in compliance with the license.
